feedback.summary: G-005 implement stage PASS (100/100). 4 files (2 NEW + 2 MODIFY) implement Delete/F2/Enter/printable key editing plus 3 Storybook stories. All acceptance criteria mapped. Zero drift.
keyFindings: D5 Enter single-cell branch logic verified: isSingleCell(selection) check at L131-132 correctly gates behavior per spec. Range selections correctly fall through (no preventDefault) to allow G-002 handleKeyDown to consume Enter.
D6 IME composition guard verified: e.nativeEvent.isComposing check at L147 properly prevents bulk edit during Korean/CJK composition — spec D6 requirement met.
D3 role separation confirmed: onDeleteRange, onBulkEdit, onEditStart callbacks remain optional and undefined-safe (L111, L265, L222/236 all check !== undefined before invoke).
D4 InlineEditCell decoupling confirmed: onEditStart callback signature matches spec D4 (cell: CellCoord, initialValue?: TCell) — caller (MOD-GRID-05/G-003) responsible for InlineEditCell activation.
D7 hook composability confirmed: useKeyboardEdit returns { onKeyDown } for chaining with G-002 handleKeyDown + G-004 useClipboard.onKeyDown per spec Section 10.1 pattern.

C-29 optional props pattern verified: all 5 optional props (isEditableColumn, onDeleteRange, onBulkEdit, onEditStart, table) in UseKeyboardEditProps use '?: T' declaration. Storybook L50-60 demonstrates proper spread-skip invocation.
